name: KAPE
description: Kroll Artifact Parser and Extractor — fast triage collection Tool: https://www.kroll.com/kape. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #976 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map KAPE output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved KAPE output file to parse instead of running it live.
